Meg 2: The Trench (2023)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $82,633,033Details
International Box Office $315,900,000
Worldwide Box Office $398,533,033
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $1,991,310
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $2,433,850
Total $4,425,160
Further financial details...

Synopsis

With time running out, expert deep sea rescue diver Jonas Taylor is recruited by a visionary Chinese oceanographer, against the wishes of his daughter Suyin, to save the crew—and the ocean itself—from an unstoppable threat: a pre-historic 75-foot-long shark known as the Megalodon.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$30,002,735 (36.3% of total gross)
Legs:2.75 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:20.7% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$129,000,000 (worldwide box office is 3.1 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,503 opening theaters/3,604 max. theaters, 5.4 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $90,337,396

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: August 4th, 2023 (Wide) by Warner Bros.
International Releases: July 29th, 2023 (Wide) (China)
August 2nd, 2023 (Wide) (France)
August 3rd, 2023 (Wide), released as Megalodón 2: El Gran Abismo (Mexico)
August 3rd, 2023 (Wide) (Croatia)
August 3rd, 2023 (Wide), released as Meg 2: O Regresso do Tubarão Gigante (Portugal)
Video Release: August 25th, 2023 by Warner Home Video
MPA Rating: PG-13 for action/violence, some bloody images, language and brief suggestive material.
(Rating bulletin 2783 (cert #54394), 5/17/2023)
Running Time: 116 minutes
Franchise: The Meg
Filming location (country): England, Thailand, United Kingdom
Plot point: Animals Gone Bad, Underwater
Subgenre: Action Horror
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Action
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Science Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Warner Bros., di Bonaventura Pictures, BCDF Pictures, Apelles Entertainment, CMC Pictures
Production Countries: United States, China
Languages: English
